violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Several boxes of single-use items were being stored on the floor in the upstairs dry storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under the kitchen equipment need to be cleaned.
